notes.scope: PubMed full-history retrieval for CAR-DC, CAR-Mac, CAR-Mono, CAR-T, and CAR-NK research articles.
notes.query_strategy: Each topic uses a two-part OR query: (1) exact phrase matches for common compound terms, (2) 'chimeric antigen receptor' AND cell-type terms for broader recall. The AND part uses the full phrase 'chimeric antigen receptor' rather than the abbreviation 'CAR' to avoid noise from the 50,000+ unrelated PubMed records that match 'CAR' alone.
notes.research_article_policy: Keep original research records across clinical, observational, animal, and in vitro studies while excluding clearly non-research publication types where metadata permits.
notes.caveat: PubMed publication type metadata is imperfect. Query-time exclusion should stay conservative; downstream code must preserve auditability by retaining raw records before filtering.
notes.version_3_changes: Rewrote all broad_query definitions to fix severe recall failures (car_dc: 9 -> ~346, car_mono: 77 -> ~186). Removed 'CAR'[tiab] AND cell-type clauses that introduced noise. Removed engineering-verb gates from AND clauses. Removed attribution config (topic boundary classification is deferred to a downstream subagent). Removed exclude_title_noise (title substring matching has high false-positive risk).

shared_blocks.exclude_publication_types: NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])

topics.label: CAR-DC
topics.description: CAR-engineered dendritic cells and dendritic-cell-derived CAR platforms.
topics.query_notes: Part 1: exact compound phrases (CAR-DC, CAR dendritic cell, etc.). Part 2: 'chimeric antigen receptor' full phrase AND dendritic cell terms. Together these capture papers that discuss CAR technology in a dendritic cell context regardless of exact phrasing.
must_hit_examples: Any paper explicitly using the phrase CAR-DC in title or abstract must be captured.
Papers discussing chimeric antigen receptor dendritic cells in any phrasing order must be captured.
topics.broad_query: ("CAR-DC"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-DCs"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND ("dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract])))
topics.filtered_query: ("CAR-DC"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-DCs"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND ("dendritic cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "dendritic cells"[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])

topics.label: CAR-Mac
topics.description: CAR macrophages and CAR-engineered macrophage studies.
topics.query_notes: Part 1: exact compound phrases (CAR-Mac, CAR macrophage, CAR-M, etc.). Part 2: 'chimeric antigen receptor' full phrase AND macrophage terms. 'CAR-M' is kept despite ~13/66 noise hits because it captures ~7 core CAR-Mac papers and ~30 relevant reviews that use 'CAR-M' as shorthand for CAR-macrophage without the full phrase. Previous query used 'CAR'[tiab] AND macrophage which introduced ~500 noise records from CAR-T papers mentioning tumor-associated macrophages.
must_hit_examples: Any paper explicitly using CAR macrophage or CAR-Mac in title or abstract must be captured.
Papers discussing chimeric antigen receptor macrophages in any phrasing order must be captured.
topics.broad_query: ("CAR-Mac"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-Macs"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-M"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND (macrophage[Title/Abstract] OR macrophages[Title/Abstract])))
topics.filtered_query: ("CAR-Mac"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-Macs"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-M"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced macrophage"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced macrophages"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND (macrophage[Title/Abstract] OR macrophages[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])

topics.label: CAR-Mono
topics.description: CAR monocytes and CAR-engineered monocyte studies.
topics.query_notes: Part 1: exact compound phrases (CAR-Mono, CAR monocyte, etc.). Part 2: 'chimeric antigen receptor' full phrase AND monocyte/monocytic terms. Previous query required engineering verbs (engineered/modified/transduced/expressing) in the AND clause, which dropped recall from ~186 to 77.
must_hit_examples: Any paper explicitly using CAR monocyte or CAR-Mono in title or abstract must be captured.
Papers discussing chimeric antigen receptor monocytes in any phrasing order must be captured.
topics.broad_query: ("CAR-Mono"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND (monocyte[Title/Abstract] OR monocytes[Title/Abstract] OR monocytic[Title/Abstract])))
topics.filtered_query: ("CAR-Mono"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-engineered monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-modified monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced monocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced monocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND (monocyte[Title/Abstract] OR monocytes[Title/Abstract] OR monocytic[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])

topics.label: CAR-T
topics.description: CAR T-cell studies across the full PubMed history.
topics.query_notes: Part 1: exact compound phrases (CAR-T, CAR T cell, etc.) plus historical terms (T-body, chimeric immune receptor). Part 2: 'chimeric antigen receptor' full phrase AND T cell / T lymphocyte terms. Previous query included 'CAR'[tiab] AND T cell which added ~6500 noise records.
must_hit_examples: Early foundational CAR T-cell papers should be maintained as sentinel validation records.
Any paper explicitly using CAR-T or chimeric antigen receptor T cell in title or abstract must be captured.
topics.broad_query: ("CAR-T"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-Ts"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T-cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T-cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T lymphocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T lymphocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-redirected T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-redirected T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-body"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-bodies"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric immune receptor"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric immune receptors"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND ("T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "T lymphocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "T lymphocytes"[Title/Abstract])))
topics.filtered_query: ("CAR-T"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-Ts"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T-cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR T cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T-cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-T cell therapy"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing T-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T lymphocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced T lymphocytes"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-redirected T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-redirected T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-body"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-bodies"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric immune receptor"[Title/Abstract] OR "chimeric immune receptors"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND ("T cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "T cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "T-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "T lymphocyte"[Title/Abstract] OR "T lymphocytes"[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])

topics.label: CAR-NK
topics.description: CAR natural killer cell studies across the full PubMed history.
topics.query_notes: Part 1: exact compound phrases (CAR-NK, CAR NK cell, NK-CAR, etc.). Part 2: 'chimeric antigen receptor' full phrase AND NK / natural killer cell terms.
must_hit_examples: Any paper explicitly using CAR-NK or chimeric antigen receptor NK cell in title or abstract must be captured.
Validation should include early and recent CAR NK engineering papers.
topics.broad_query: ("CAR-NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-NKs"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing natural killer cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing natural killer cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced natural killer cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced natural killer cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-CAR"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-CARs"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND ("NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural killer cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural killer cells"[Title/Abstract])))
topics.filtered_query: ("CAR-NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-NKs"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR NK-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing natural killer cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-expressing natural killer cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced natural killer cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "CAR-transduced natural killer cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-CAR"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-CARs"[Title/Abstract] OR ("chimeric antigen receptor"[Title/Abstract] AND ("NK cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "NK-cells"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural killer cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural killer cells"[Title/Abstract]))) NOT (Review[Publication Type] OR Systematic Review[Publication Type] OR Meta-Analysis[Publication Type] OR Editorial[Publication Type] OR Comment[Publication Type] OR Letter[Publication Type] OR News[Publication Type] OR Biography[Publication Type] OR Interview[Publication Type] OR Lecture[Publication Type] OR Guideline[Publication Type] OR Practice Guideline[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference[Publication Type] OR Consensus Development Conference, NIH[Publication Type] OR Historical Article[Publication Type] OR Published Erratum[Publication Type] OR Retraction of Publication[Publication Type] OR Duplicate Publication[Publication Type])
